home.title: Financial Accounts
home.createOrEditLabel: Create or edit a Financial Account

financialAccount.created: A new Financial Account is created with identifier {{ param }}
financialAccount.updated: A Financial Account is updated with identifier {{ param }}
financialAccount.deleted: A Financial Account is deleted with identifier {{ param }}

delete.question: Are you sure you want to delete Financial Account {{ id }}?

financialAccount.name: Name

initialBalanceHelpByAccountType.DEBIT: Amount available when you started tracking this account. Negative values represent overdraft or a negative balance.
initialBalanceHelpByAccountType.CASH: Cash on hand when you started tracking. Negative values can represent an adjustment or negative cash position.
initialBalanceHelpByAccountType.CREDIT_CARD: Use a positive number if you owed money, or a negative number if you had credit in your favor. This is not your credit limit.
initialBalanceHelpByAccountType.INVESTMENT: Account value when you started tracking. Detailed investment valuation is deferred.

financialAccount.creditDetailsMissing: Credit card details have not been configured yet.
